prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins with a static title card on a beige background. Large black text reads “DULUTH TRADING,” with red text below reading “DULUTHTRADING.COM.” It then cuts briefly to black.

After the black frame, the visual style changes to a 3D animated prehistoric setting. A rocky volcano or mountain smokes under a bright blue sky. An “InnoGames” watermark appears near the upper right. A caveman-like male figure crouches in a dry, desert-like landscape near a simple stone shelter. He holds or raises an object in one hand. Nearby, a red-haired woman in animal-skin clothing stands in front of the stone shelter, looking downward.

The sequence then shows close views of small protruding pegs or tools fixed into different materials: first a dark rock face, then a wooden surface. A “foe.tv” watermark appears at the lower right. The backgrounds shift from arid terrain to greener countryside, suggesting a progression through different environments or eras.

The setting then changes to a medieval/fantasy village. A timber-framed house with a stone lower level is shown. A man stands to the left near the house, and a woman in a dress is seen from behind on the right. The village is bright and colorful, with trees and blue sky in the background. A semi-transparent transition overlays the house scene with a closer view of a female character.

Next, a medieval town or construction area appears. A bearded man wearing a cap and vest stands at a table with small wooden blocks, while the red-haired woman stands behind him. The surrounding area includes timber buildings, a watchtower, scaffolding, and a crane-like structure. A close-up shows a hand placing or moving a wooden block among other blocks on the table, visually suggesting building or planning.

Later, the commercial transitions to a modern digital interface scene. Multiple screens or panels are visible, including a map-like display and smaller rectangular windows. Along the bottom are app-style badges or buttons, but the small text is not fully legible in the sampled frame. The “foe.tv” watermark remains visible.

The final frames present the product/game title. A large shield-and-banner logo fills the screen with the text “FORGE OF EMPIRES” in large gold and white lettering on a red banner. In the last frame, the same logo remains centered over a blurred medieval town background. A search bar appears below it, containing partially typed text beginning with “www.fo,” alongside a magnifying-glass icon.
